common.tagline: Software Support Service for the Apple World

hero.title: Your Apple, in expert hands.
hero.subtitle: Software support for Mac, iPad and iPhone in Granada. We prevent problems before they appear and fix them fast when they do. No queues, no jargon, no lost data.

preventive.title: Truly preventive
preventive.description: We don't wait for your device to fail. We keep it in shape: safe updates, backups, performance and clean-ups. Fewer scares, more years of useful life.

corrective.title: Stress-free fixes
corrective.description: Something off? We diagnose it, explain what's going on in plain language and fix it. Remote or on-site, keeping you informed every step.

specialist.title: Software only, 100% Apple
specialist.description: We specialise in the Apple ecosystem: macOS, iPadOS and iOS. No generic waiting lists: we speak your language and your devices'.

segments.title: Whether you have a single MacBook or a fleet of 50 devices, we have a plan for you:
segments.student: Students — so your Mac never fails you on deadline or exam day.
segments.home: Homes — one Apple expert for the whole family, hassle-free.
segments.professional: Professionals — your device is your work tool; we keep it ready to go.
segments.business: Businesses — managed support for your Apple device fleet.

cta.title: Real support, no hassle.
cta.subtitle: Tell us what's wrong with your device and we'll get straight to work.

services.title: Services
services.intro: At AppleGranada we do just one thing, but we do it really well: take care of the software on your Apple devices.

preventive.title: Preventive support
preventive.description: Routine maintenance to stop problems before they start.
items: Safe macOS, iPadOS and iOS updates
Clean-up of junk files and duplicate apps

corrective.title: Corrective support
corrective.description: When something already fails, we fix it without losing your data.
items: Mac running slow, overheating or restarting on its own

services.modes: Remote, at your home or office, or at our service point in Granada.
services.modeRemoteDesc: Via TeamViewer, from wherever you are
services.modeOnsiteDesc: At your home or office in Granada

plans.title: Pricing
plans.description: Apple technical support billed by the hour
plans.notLoggedIn: Sign in to select a plan

teamviewer.title: Remote support with TeamViewer
teamviewer.description: For remote support, we use TeamViewer for free. Here's how to install and connect.

steps.title: Download TeamViewer
steps.description: Go to teamviewer.com/en/download/ and download the free version for Mac/Windows/Linux.

steps.title: Run the installer
steps.description: Open the downloaded file and follow the installation wizard. You don't need to enter personal information.

steps.title: Accept terms
steps.description: Accept the terms of use. The free version is valid for personal use and remote support.

steps.title: All set
steps.description: Once installed, you'll see a TeamViewer window with your unique ID (9 digits) and password.

connection.title: How to connect during a support session

steps.title: Open TeamViewer
steps.description: Click the TeamViewer icon on your desktop or in the applications menu.

steps.title: Share your ID
steps.description: In the 'Remote Support' section, you'll see your 9-digit ID and a temporary password. Share these with us.

steps.title: Accept the connection
steps.description: When we connect, TeamViewer will show you a notification. Click 'Accept' to allow access.

steps.title: Your privacy is safe
steps.description: You can see exactly what we're doing on your screen. The session ends when you close TeamViewer or click 'Disconnect'.

security.title: Security information
points: TeamViewer is trusted software used by millions worldwide.
Your ID and password change every time TeamViewer restarts.
Only we can access your device; we can't see your screen without your permission.
Uninstalling TeamViewer after support is completely safe.

issues.problem: I can't see the ID or password
issues.solution: Make sure TeamViewer is fully open and visible. If they don't appear, restart the application.

issues.problem: It asks for a password when connecting
issues.solution: This is normal. It's a security measure. We'll provide the password when it's time for the session.
This is common. Add TeamViewer to your antivirus exceptions list or contact us for another option.

issues.problem: I'm not sure if I'm using the correct free version
issues.solution: If you downloaded from teamviewer.com/en/download/ with the 'Remote Support' option, it's correct.

about.title: About AppleGranada
about.intro1: We are a software technical service specialising exclusively in the Apple ecosystem, based in Granada. We were born out of the frustration of watching Mac, iPhone and iPad users lose hours (and data) because they had no trusted expert to call.
about.intro2: We don't do hardware, don't repair screens, don't sell accessories. Just Apple software, and we do it very well. That means when you call us, you're speaking to someone who truly knows macOS, iOS and iPadOS — not a generic technician who opens the machine and improvises.
about.intro3: We work remotely via TeamViewer (no need to travel) and on-site at your home or office within Granada and the surrounding area.

honesty.title: Honesty
honesty.description: We tell you the truth even if it's not what you want to hear. No surprise invoices.

specialization.title: Specialisation
specialization.description: Apple only. That lets us know the ecosystem in depth and give you the best service.

punctuality.title: Punctuality
punctuality.description: We respect your time. We confirm appointments and meet the deadlines we promise.

personal.title: Personal attention
personal.description: You have a dedicated contact who knows your devices and your history. No call centres.

about.locationText: We primarily serve Granada and the metropolitan area. Remote support is available anywhere in Spain. For on-site support outside Granada, please ask us.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Tell us what's wrong with your device. We'll get straight to work.
contact.successMsg: Message sent. We'll get back to you soon.
contact.responseText: We reply to all messages within 24 working hours. For urgent matters, message us directly on WhatsApp.
